name: Scope 3 Attribution
description: Analyze supplier sustainability programs impact on Scope 3 emissions reduction.
suggested_queries: Which suppliers have the highest emissions reduction potential?
What is the causal effect of supplier programs on Scope 3 emissions?
How do regional differences affect supplier sustainability outcomes?

name: Discount vs Churn
description: Estimate the causal impact of discount offers on customer churn using 2000 customer records.
suggested_queries: Estimate impact of discount on churn
Does offering a discount reduce customer churn?
What is the causal effect of discounts controlling for region and tenure?

name: Conversion Belief Update
description: Update belief on conversion rate with binomial data using Bayesian inference.
suggested_queries: Update belief on our conversion rate
What is the posterior distribution of the conversion rate given 42 successes in 100 trials?
How confident should we be in our current conversion rate estimate?

name: Renewable Energy ROI
description: Estimate ROI from renewable energy investments across facilities with regional variations.
suggested_queries: What is the ROI of solar panel installations across our facilities?
Does renewable energy investment causally reduce operating costs?
Which facility types benefit most from renewable energy?

name: Shipping Mode Analysis
description: Analyze how shipping mode changes affect carbon footprint across 1200 shipment records.
suggested_queries: How does switching shipping modes affect carbon footprint?
What is the causal impact of sea vs air freight on emissions?
Estimate the emissions reduction from optimizing freight logistics

name: Supply Chain Resilience

name: Pricing Strategy Optimization
description: Analyze causal impact of price changes on sales volume across 1500 product records.
suggested_queries: What is the causal effect of price increases on sales volume?

name: New Product Market Adoption
description: Model uncertainty in new product market adoption using Bayesian inference for Complex domain analysis.
suggested_queries: What is the probability that our adoption rate exceeds 50%?
How does uncertainty in adoption change with more data?
What should we probe next to reduce adoption uncertainty?

name: Supply Chain Crisis Response
description: Chaotic domain scenario simulating critical supplier failure requiring immediate stabilization.
suggested_queries: Critical supplier just failed - what immediate actions should we take?
System is experiencing cascading failures - stabilize now!
Emergency: 5 suppliers offline, need crisis response plan

name: Inventory Data Lookup
description: Clear domain scenario for simple deterministic inventory and product queries.
suggested_queries: What is the current stock level for product X?
List all products in Electronics category
Show me supplier contact information
